messages.batch_create_failed: Failed to create gift card batch

markets.create_description: Group countries into a single pricing region with its own currency and locales.
markets.edit_description: Update name, currency, locales, or country coverage.

delete_confirm.title: Delete market?
delete_confirm.message: {{name}} will be removed. Orders previously placed in this market remain intact.

multi_codes.label: Generate a batch of unique codes
multi_codes.help: Useful for one-time-use codes — each customer redeems a different code.

code_prefix.label: Code prefix (optional)
code_prefix.help: Each generated code will start with this prefix.

field_type.label: Type
field_type.read_only_help: The type can't be changed once values exist — switching it would leave stored values misinterpreted.

resource_type.label: Applies to
resource_type.read_only_help: The owner can't be changed once values exist for this field.

is_default.label: Default
is_default.help: Setting this demotes the previous default. Products without an explicit category fall back to this one.

origin.label: Origin
origin.help: Bare scheme + host (+ optional port). No path, query, or fragment.

code.label: Code
code.help: Stable identifier used by API clients via the X-Spree-Channel header and for order attribution. Leave blank to auto-derive from the name. Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores.

active.label: Active
active.help: Inactive sales channels stop accepting orders and aren't matched by the X-Spree-Channel header.

default.label: Default channel
default.help: Exactly one channel per store is the default. Used as the fallback when no channel is selected and as the auto-publish target for new products.

order_routing_strategy.label: Order routing strategy
order_routing_strategy.help: Overrides the store-level routing strategy for orders attributed to this channel. Leave blank to inherit.

storefront_access.label: Storefront access
storefront_access.help: Controls what anonymous visitors can see on this channel. Leave blank to inherit the store setting. When prices are hidden, guests must sign in to check out.

options.public: Public — anyone can browse and see prices
options.prices_hidden: Prices hidden — visitors must sign in to see prices
options.login_required: Login required — visitors must sign in to browse

guest_checkout.label: Guest checkout
guest_checkout.help: Whether shoppers can check out without an account on this channel. Leave blank to inherit the store setting.

name.label: Name
name.help: Internal label — never shown to customers.

starts_at.label: Starts
starts_at.help: When this list becomes active. Leave blank to start immediately on activation.

ends_at.label: Ends
ends_at.help: Leave blank for no end date.

customers.label: Customers
customers.help: Leave empty to apply this rule to every signed-in customer.

customer_groups.label: Customer groups
customer_groups.help: Leave empty to apply this rule to every customer regardless of group.

markets.label: Markets
markets.help: Leave empty to apply this rule in every market.

channels.label: Sales channels
channels.help: Leave empty to apply this rule on every sales channel.

admin_name.label: Internal name
admin_name.placeholder: Optional — shown only in the admin

active.label: Active
active.help: Inactive locations don't appear in fulfillment selection.

default.label: Default location
default.help: New stock items propagate here. Only one location can be default.

backorderable_default.label: Backorderable by default
backorderable_default.help: New stock items default to allowing backorders when out of stock.

propagate_all_variants.label: Auto-create stock items for all variants
propagate_all_variants.help: Create stock items at this location for every product variant.

pickup_enabled.label: Allow customer pickup
pickup_enabled.help: Customers can pick orders up from this location at checkout.

pickup_instructions.label: Pickup instructions
pickup_instructions.placeholder: Where the customer should go to collect their order.

active.label: Active
active.help: Inactive methods are hidden from checkout.

auto_capture.label: Auto-capture
auto_capture.help: Capture funds automatically on authorization. When off, you must capture manually.

currency.label: Currency
currency.help: ISO 4217 currency used for all prices in this market.

default_locale.label: Default locale
default_locale.help: Storefront language for shoppers in this market.

supported_locales.label: Supported locales
supported_locales.help: Additional languages shoppers can switch to. The default locale is always included.

country_isos.label: Countries
country_isos.help: Pick the countries this market covers. Each country can belong to at most one market per store.

tax_inclusive.label: Tax-inclusive pricing
tax_inclusive.help: Display prices with tax included. Common in EU markets.

default.label: Default market
default.help: Shoppers without a known country see this market. Only one can be default per store.

name.label: Internal name
name.help: Lowercase identifier. Must be unique across the store.

label.label: Label
label.help: Shown to customers on the storefront.

kind.label: Kind
kind.help: Controls how the option renders on the storefront. Color swatch shows a hex color; buttons show a thumbnail image.

filterable.label: Filterable
filterable.help: Show this option as a filter in storefront product listings.

preorderable.label: Available for pre-order
preorderable.help: Sell this variant before it's in stock. Cap how many you'll take with the backorder limit, enter incoming stock as the count, or leave it blank for unlimited.

preorder_ships_at.label: Ships by
preorder_ships_at.help: When you expect to ship pre-orders. Shown to customers as the delivery promise; the pre-order ends once this date passes.

backorder_limit.label: Backorder limit
backorder_limit.help: Maximum number of units sold beyond available stock — caps backorders and pre-orders. Leave blank for unlimited.

storefront_access.label: Storefront access
storefront_access.help: Store-wide default for what anonymous visitors can see. Channels can override this. When prices are hidden, guests must sign in to check out.

options.public: Public — anyone can browse and see prices
options.prices_hidden: Prices hidden — visitors must sign in to see prices
options.login_required: Login required — visitors must sign in to browse

guest_checkout.label: Guest checkout
guest_checkout.help: Store-wide default for whether shoppers can check out without an account. Channels can override this.

mail_from_address.label: Sender address
mail_from_address.help: Used as the From address on every transactional email.

customer_support_email.label: Customer support email
customer_support_email.help: Reply-to address shown to customers in storefront emails.

new_order_notifications_email.label: New order notifications
new_order_notifications_email.help: Recipient of "new order placed" notifications. Leave blank to disable.

preferred_send_consumer_transactional_em.label: Send transactional emails to customers
preferred_send_consumer_transactional_em.help: When off, no order confirmation, shipping, or refund emails are sent.

mailer_logo.label: Email logo
mailer_logo.help: PNG or JPG with a transparent background. Embedded in transactional email headers.

logo.label: Store logo
logo.help: PNG or JPG with a transparent background. Shown in the storefront header.

name.label: Name
name.help: Optional label shown in this list.

subscriptions.label: Events
subscriptions.help: Select which events should trigger a webhook. Choose nothing to receive every event.

published_at.label: Publish from
published_at.help: Leave empty to go live immediately.

unpublished_at.label: Unpublish on
unpublished_at.help: Leave empty to keep listed indefinitely.

code.label: Code
code.help: Leave blank to auto-generate. For batches, this becomes the prefix.

quantity.label: Quantity
quantity.help: 1 issues a single card. More than 1 issues a batch with auto-generated codes.

channel.label: Sales channel
channel.help: Attribute the order to a specific sales channel. Defaults to the store's online channel.

alt.label: Alt text
alt.placeholder: Describe the image for accessibility and SEO

avatar.label: Photo
avatar.help: Shown next to your name across the admin. Square images look best.

selected_locale.label: Language
selected_locale.help: Language used across the admin dashboard. Only affects what you see.

promotions.rule_types_all_used: Every available rule type is already on this promotion.

rules_card.title: Rules
rules_card.description: Conditions that decide whether the promotion applies.
rules_card.empty: No rules. Without rules, the promotion always qualifies (subject to schedule and usage limit).

validation.prefix_required: Prefix is required for multi-code batches
validation.number_of_codes_required: Pick how many codes to generate
validation.expiry_after_start: Expiry must be after the start date

delete_confirm.title: Delete promotion?
delete_confirm.message: {{name}} will be removed permanently. Promotions referenced by completed orders cannot be deleted.

any.label: Any of these products
any.description: Order must contain at least one.

none.label: None of these products
none.description: Order must not contain any of them.

any.label: Any of these categories
any.description: Order must contain a product in at least one.

all.label: All of these categories
all.description: Order must contain a product in every category.

customer.label: Customers
customer.search_placeholder: Search customers by name or email…

trigger_summary.locked_help: Trigger settings can't be changed after creation. Make a new promotion to change them.

remove_rule_confirm.title: Remove rule?
remove_rule_confirm.message: Removed when you save the promotion.

rule_picker.title: Add rule
rule_picker.description: Pick a rule type to configure.

rule_edit.no_options: This rule has no configurable options — its presence alone applies the constraint.

actions_card.description: What happens when the promotion qualifies.
actions_card.empty: No actions yet. A promotion without actions doesn't do anything when applied.

remove_action_confirm.title: Remove action?
remove_action_confirm.message: Removed when you save the promotion.

action_picker.title: Add action
action_picker.description: Pick what should happen when the promotion qualifies.

action_edit.no_options: This action has no configurable options.

coupon_codes.title: Coupon codes
coupon_codes.description: Auto-generated codes for this promotion. Read-only — regenerate by changing the promotion's number-of-codes setting.
coupon_codes.description_with_count: {{count}} auto-generated codes. Read-only — regenerate by changing the promotion's number-of-codes setting.

category.name: Categories
category.description: Order includes products in specified categories

country.name: Country
country.description: Limit to orders with shipping address in a specific country

currency.name: Currency
currency.description: Limit to orders in a specific currency

customer.name: Customers
customer.description: Available only to the specified customers

customer_group.name: Customer Group(s)
customer_group.description: Available only to customers in specified customer group(s)

customer_logged_in.name: Only logged in customers
customer_logged_in.description: Available only to logged in customers

first_order.name: First order
first_order.description: Must be the customer's first order

option_value.name: Option Value(s)
option_value.description: Order includes products with matching option value(s)

create_adjustment.name: Create whole-order adjustment
create_adjustment.description: Creates a promotion credit adjustment on the order

create_item_adjustments.name: Create per-line-item adjustment
create_item_adjustments.description: Creates a promotion credit adjustment on a line item

create_line_items.name: Create line items
create_line_items.description: Populates the cart with the specified quantity of variant

free_shipping.name: Free shipping
free_shipping.description: Makes all shipments for the order free

custom_fields.empty_description: Track structured details like material, fit, or care instructions.
custom_fields.values_save_partial_failed: Some custom fields could not be saved: {{fields}}
custom_fields.new_definition_description: Define a custom field to store typed, structured information on your {{resource}}.

adjustment_action_editor.no_extra_settings: This calculator has no extra settings.

staff.title: Staff
staff.subtitle: Manage admin teammates and roles
staff.empty_description: Invite a teammate to collaborate on this store.

invite_sheet.title: Invite teammate
invite_sheet.description: We'll email them a link to set their password.

channels.title: Sales channels
channels.create_description: Sales channels group orders and product listings — "online", "pos", a marketplace integration, etc.
channels.edit_description: Rename a sales channel or pause it. Inactive sales channels stop accepting orders.

delete_confirm.title: Delete sales channel?
delete_confirm.message: {{name}} will be removed. Products and orders attached to it will lose their sales-channel reference.

validation.code_format: Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores only

new.title: New product
new.description: Set up your product — add variants, prices, inventory, media, and custom fields

bulk_prices.no_variants: Add at least one variant to start editing prices.

publishing.title: Publishing
publishing.manage_description: Pick which sales channels list this product. Toggle a channel off to unlist it everywhere.
publishing.empty: Not listed on any sales channel yet.
publishing.no_channels: No sales channels available. Create one in Settings → Sales channels.

bulk.status_sheet_description: Pick the status to apply to the selected products.
bulk.categories_add_description: Pick the categories to add these products to.
bulk.categories_remove_description: Pick the categories to remove these products from.
bulk.channels_add_description: Pick the sales channels to list these products on.
bulk.channels_remove_description: Pick the sales channels to unlist these products from.
bulk.tags_add_description: Pick or create tags to add to these products.
bulk.tags_remove_description: Pick tags to remove from these products.

delete_confirm.message: Selected products will be removed. This action cannot be undone.

bulk.channels_add_failed: Failed to list products on sales channels
bulk.channels_remove_failed: Failed to unlist products from sales channels

price_lists.title: Price Lists
price_lists.subtitle: Targeted pricing for customer groups, regions, or volume tiers.

delete_confirm.title: Delete price list?
delete_confirm.message: Removing "{{name}}" deletes its prices. This cannot be undone.

price_lists.rule_no_options: This rule has no configurable options — its presence alone applies the constraint.

remove_rule_confirm.title: Remove rule?
remove_rule_confirm.message: The rule is removed when you save the price list.

price_lists.rules_help: Conditions that decide when this list applies. Use "all" to require every rule, "any" to take the first match.
price_lists.rules_empty: No rules — this list applies to every shopper.
price_lists.add_rule_help: Pick a rule type to configure.
price_lists.rule_types_all_used: Every available rule type is already on this list.
price_lists.products_help: Pick the products this list applies to. Placeholder prices are created on save — fill them in below.
price_lists.prices_help_one: {{count}} price configured. Open the bulk editor to update it.
price_lists.prices_help_other: {{count}} prices configured. Open the bulk editor to update them.
price_lists.prices_help_zero: Pick products above to seed placeholder prices, then open the bulk editor.

activate_confirm.title: Activate price list?
activate_confirm.message: "{{name}}" will apply to qualifying customers immediately and stay active until manually deactivated.
activate_confirm.message_with_end: "{{name}}" will apply to qualifying customers immediately and stay active until manually deactivated or its end date ({{ends_at}}).

schedule_confirm.title: Schedule price list?
schedule_confirm.message: "{{name}}" will go live on {{starts_at}} and stay active until its end date.

deactivate_confirm.title: Deactivate price list?
deactivate_confirm.message: "{{name}}" will stop applying to customers immediately. Existing orders are unaffected.

unschedule_confirm.title: Unschedule price list?
unschedule_confirm.message: "{{name}}" will no longer activate on its scheduled date. You can re-schedule or activate it manually later.

edit_prices.title: Edit prices — {{name}}
edit_prices.empty: No products in this list yet.
edit_prices.search_placeholder: Search by product, SKU, or option…
edit_prices.no_matches_for_filters: No prices match the current filters.
edit_prices.empty_pick_products: Pick products on the price list to start setting prices.

discard_confirm.title: Discard unsaved prices?
discard_confirm.message_close_one: You have {{count}} unsaved price. Closing will discard it.
discard_confirm.message_close_other: You have {{count}} unsaved prices. Closing will discard them.
discard_confirm.message_currency: Switching currency will discard your unsaved prices.

price_lists.products_empty: No products yet — add one to start editing prices.

store.title: Store settings
store.subtitle: General configuration and store-wide defaults.
store.logo_dimensions_help: Recommended: max 40px display height (any width/aspect ratio). Upload at 80px tall for retina sharpness.

emails.title: Email settings
emails.subtitle: Sender addresses, notifications, and the logo embedded in transactional emails.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.subtitle: Subscribe HTTPS endpoints to events fired by your store.
webhooks.empty_description: Create an endpoint to receive a signed POST every time a subscribed event fires.

delete_confirm.title: Delete webhook endpoint?
delete_confirm.message: {{name}} will stop receiving deliveries immediately. Past delivery history is also removed.

webhooks.save_secret_description: Verify incoming webhook signatures with this key. We won't show it again.

health.label: Health
health.auto_disabled_alert: This endpoint was automatically disabled after repeated delivery failures.

deliveries.empty: No deliveries yet — send a test to verify your endpoint.

detail.response_body_truncated: Response body was truncated to {{limit}} characters.

api_keys.title: API keys
api_keys.subtitle: Authorize integrations and apps to call the Admin API.
api_keys.publishable_help: Used by your storefront. Safe to expose in client-side code.
api_keys.secret_help: Server-to-server only. Scope each key to the operations it needs.
api_keys.save_secret_description: Copy this value now — we won't show it again.

sheet.create_description: Issue a single gift card or generate a batch with auto-generated codes.
sheet.edit_description: Update the gift card's customer or expiry. The code and amount are immutable once issued.

delete_confirm.title: Delete gift card?
delete_confirm.message: This will void the gift card and prevent it from being redeemed.

validation.amount_positive: Amount must be greater than zero

prefix.label: Prefix
prefix.placeholder: e.g. WELCOME — codes will be WELCOME-abc123

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal details and admin language.

invitation.missing_token_message: This link looks incomplete. Ask whoever invited you to send it again.
invitation.not_found_message: This invitation has expired, been revoked, or already been accepted. Ask the inviter to send a new one.
invitation.generic_error_message: Something went wrong. Please try again.

confirm.remove_message: {{name}} will lose access to this store.
confirm.revoke_message: {{email}} will no longer be able to accept this invitation.

staff.edit_description: Update profile details and assigned roles for this staff member.

api_keys.create_sheet_description: Choose a key type, then pick the scopes it can use.
api_keys.edit_sheet_description: Rename this key. Scopes are fixed when a key is created and can't be changed.
api_keys.scopes_immutable_help: Scopes can't be changed after a key is created. To change them, create a new key with the scopes you need and revoke this one.

key_type.secret_description: Server-to-server. Each key carries an explicit list of scopes.
key_type.publishable_description: Safe to expose in client-side code. Grants public/guest access.

api_keys.warning_treat_like_password: Treat this key like a password. Store it in your secrets manager — we can't show it again.

revoke_confirm.title: Revoke key?
revoke_confirm.message: Any integration using this key will stop working immediately.

delete_confirm.title: Delete key?
delete_confirm.message: This permanently removes the key. Prefer revoke if you might restore access later.

picker.remove_description: Pick the groups to remove these customers from.
